positive: A vibrant, stylized graphic illustration of a whimsical woodland scene, featuring a group of friendly forest animals (e.g., foxes, rabbits, owls) interacting around a magical, luminous mushroom patch. The style should be a modern, clean, vector-art aesthetic with bold outlines and flat blocks of color, evoking a cheerful, natural fairytale mood. The composition must be central and symmetrical, designed for high-contrast apparel printing. Use a limited but vivid color palette of deep emerald greens, sapphire blues, burnt oranges, and creamy off-whites. Dramatic, even overhead lighting to eliminate deep shadows, giving a crisp, printable look. High saturation, perfect lines, suitable for a continuous repeat pattern or central chest print.
negative: blurry, grainy, artifacts, noise, watermark, text, signature, poor anatomy, multiple limbs, extra digits, low resolution, grayscale, realistic photo, photographic, mutated, messy
